log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Shifter — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 15] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 51/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Shifter — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 46/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 17 damage. Shifter — Armored Escapist HP: 42/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Shifter — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 26 damage. Shifter — Armored Escapist HP: 16/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Shifter — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Shifter — Armored Escapist HP: -6/59
REASONING: Throwing rock at Shifter — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 55 damage. Shifter — Armored Escapist HP: 4/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (4/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Shifter — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Shifter — Armored Escapist (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
--- Shifter — Armored Escapist --- HP: 4/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.

→ Rock: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 35 damage. Shifter — Armored Escapist HP: -31/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Shifter — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 15] FAIL!

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 15] FAIL!
